company.name: Bristol Myers Squibb
company.subtitle: Total Revenues $48.2B 2025 (-0.2%) | Growth Portfolio +17% | Cobenfy/Camzyos/Reblozyl/Opdualag growth | Eliquis LOE 2028 | Cobenfy AD readout 2026
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (~$15B+ op cash flow); post-Karuna $14B + Mirati $4.8B + RayzeBio $4.1B acq 2023-24

indications.name: AF stroke prevention + VTE + post-orthopedic prophylaxis

assets.name: Heritage portfolio + Other revenues (legacy + alliance income)

indications.name: Heritage tail (Eliquis royalties to BMS-Pfizer profit share + legacy ROW alliance)

market.notes: Legacy Portfolio (~$5.1B 2025 reported; -16%) minus already-broken-out Pomalyst+Revlimid+Sprycel+Empliciti. Residual: Vidaza generic remnant, Coumadin/Pradaxa generics ROW, Plavix ROW alliance, Sustiva HIV legacy, Baraclude HBV legacy, AranELL biosim, Hu5F9 magrolimab impairments. Plus Other revenues. ~$2.7B.

mega_bear.narrative: Eliquis LOE 2028 cliff steeper; Opdivo lost share to Keytruda; Cobenfy slow ramp; pipeline misses
events: X Opdivo NSCLC share loss to Keytruda
X Camzyos market caps at $2B (REMS friction)

bear.narrative: Steady growth portfolio offsets legacy; Cobenfy modest schizo ramp; Camzyos $3B peak

base.narrative: Cobenfy schizo + AD blockbuster; Camzyos + Reblozyl + Opdualag drive Growth Portfolio; pipeline 2/3 wins
events: V Cobenfy approved AD agitation 2026; AD psychosis 2027 -- $5B+ peak
V Reblozyl $4B+ across MDS + beta-thal + MF expansion
V Milvexian Factor XIa AF Ph3 positive

bull.narrative: Cobenfy $10B+ AD/schizo dominance; Camzyos $5B+; Milvexian replaces DOACs in AF; growth offsets legacy cliff
events: V Cobenfy $10B+ schizo + AD psychosis + AD agitation
V Milvexian XIa replaces DOAC in select AF (~$5B BMY-share)

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise dominance; Cobenfy $15B AD/schizo blockbuster; full pipeline approved

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenues $48.19B (-0.2%); Growth Portfolio $25B+ (+17%) offsetting Legacy $5.1B (-16%). Eliquis 2028 LOE settled; Cobenfy AD label expansion key catalyst.
points: Breyanzi $1.4B (+25%); CD19 CAR-T expansion CLL (2024) + 3rd-line indications
Cobenfy $140M (schizophrenia, Karuna acq Dec 2023; AD agitation Ph3 2026 readout)

nextCatalyst.title: Cobenfy ARISE AD agitation + Milvexian LIBREXIA-AF + Cendakimab EoE
thresholds: H2 2026: Cobenfy ARISE-2/-3 AD agitation Ph3 readouts (transformational)
H2 2026: Milvexian LIBREXIA-AF Factor XIa Ph3 readout

risks: Opdivo NSCLC share vs Keytruda (Merck $30B+ class leader)
Cobenfy AD readouts binary; Karuna $14B premium thesis
Camzyos vs Cytokinetics aficamten Ph3 + label competition
Milvexian Factor XIa class: Bayer asundexian Ph3 STOPPED 2024 (futility)
Revlimid+Pomalyst+Sprycel combined $5B+ in IMiD/TKI LOE cliff 2025-27
Carvykti (JNJ/LEGN) replacing Abecma in BCMA CAR-T
Acquisitions $23B+ 2023-24 -- synergy realization vs goodwill impairment risk
